description: Calculate the fabric requirements for the quilting project, including area calculations, shrinkage factors, and yardage conversion with fabric width constraints. Determine the additional fabric needed and the total cost. Save the final calculations to ~/Documents/fabric_requirements.xlsx.

natural_language.prompt: Complete the fabric calculator spreadsheet by adding formulas to calculate total fabric requirements, accounting for shrinkage, fabric width constraints, and costs. Determine how much additional fabric needs to be purchased.
